channel.title: Contract Software Engineering on Charlie Howes | Contract Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Contract Software Engineering on Charlie Howes | Contract Software Engineer

item.title: Experience
item.description:
Profile

Senior backend engineer specializing in Go-based distributed systems and payments infrastructure. I have led design and delivery of high-throughput platforms across multiple teams, with a focus on event-driven architecture and correctness under failure.

Recent roles

Betika (Contract) - Senior Software Engineer

Remote | March 2026 to Present

  • Contract engagement focused on backend delivery and platform development.

Banked - Senior Backend Engineer, Payments

Remote | November 2021 to February 2026

item.title: About
item.description:
I am Charlie Howes, a senior backend engineer focused on distributed systems, payments, and delivery in regulated environments.

I have worked across high-scale financial platforms, leading architecture and migrations that needed to be safe, observable, and production-ready from day one.

I recently started contracting and I am available for:

  • Go backend platform development
  • Event-driven system design and migration
  • Payments infrastructure and integrations
  • Reliability, observability, and incident resilience

I work best with teams that need to move quickly without compromising quality, compliance, or operational safety.
